data.content: Review result: requested changes. The beat-detail lightbox change in commit a978a9ff appears aligned with the specified inline ID + alias presentation, but implementation_review requires verified sanity gates and that verification is currently blocked. Running bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts fails during transform because the working tree has unresolved merge markers at src/components/dep-tree.tsx:73-80. Since this review step is read-only for repository code and git state, I could not clear the conflict or complete gate validation. Resolve the dep-tree conflict, rerun the relevant gates, and return the knot to implementation_review.
